name: Users Profile
description: Gestione informazioni utente e preferenze (Lazy Loading enabled).

commands.get_profile: Ottiene i dettagli completi del profilo (email, telefono, etc.)
commands.update_profile: Aggiorna i campi del profilo utente

function.name: USERS__get_profile
function.description: Retrieves the full profile of a user, including contact details and bio. Use this tool when you need to know the user's email, phone, or address.

function.name: USERS__update_profile
function.description: Updates one or more fields in the user's profile. White-listed fields: display_name, email, phone, address, city, bio_notes, preferred_language, age, birthday, height, weight, interests, etc.
